title: digitaria sanguinalis var. pruriens
intro: Digitaria sanguinalis var. pruriens, also known as itch grass or itch grass Digitaria, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae and is native to Africa and Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, and is used to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions like eczema and acne. The health benefits of Digitaria sanguinalis var. pruriens include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and provide relief from itching and skin irritation. The plant is typically prepared for medicinal use through infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
